overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit dystopian city street. The player moves along a sidewalk beneath elevated highways, passing holographic advertisements and storefronts before reaching a busy intersection with vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure, passing illuminated storefronts and advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue outfit walking ahead on the sidewalk before moving out of view

entered.detail: large illuminated sign for MARK 24 store mounted on building facade
storefront with prominent DELAMAIN signage and neon red lighting
large pink neon billboard with WATSON WHORE text on distant building
massive elevated highway overpass creating a roof over the street
green neon OPEN sign on storefront door

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a neon-lit cyberpunk street beneath an elevated highway. The camera walks forward along the sidewalk, passing the MARK 24 and DELAMAIN storefronts while the Watson Whore billboard glows in the distance. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and the covered structure creates a sheltered, neon-drenched corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional urban corridor with large digital billboards approaching major intersection

events.description: transitioning from dense storefront section to corridor lined with large digital billboards on the right wall
ambient light increases as approaching the open intersection ahead, mixing neon with distant city glow

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the covered walkway, passing large digital advertisements while approaching the illuminated intersection

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying EL FLOPPO advertisement with purple neon text
digital screen showing DTR corporate advertisement with spaceship imagery
curved ramp structure of the elevated highway system

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper under the highway structure, the scene shifts to a corridor lined with massive digital billboards including EL FLOPPO and DTR advertisements. The camera continues walking forward as the environment transitions from enclosed storefronts to a more open approach toward the intersection, with ambient light gradually increasing.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and multi-lane vehicle traffic

events.description: exiting the covered walkway and arriving at the wide street intersection with crosswalk markings
waiting at the crosswalk as vehicles including a black SUV pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk, waiting for traffic to clear, then beginning to cross the multi-lane street

notable_agents.action: security officer in uniform standing at the corner near the crosswalk
black SUV driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the asphalt
tall cylindrical building with illuminated windows and modern architecture
tall pole with traffic signals and overhead highway signs attached

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide urban intersection as the camera exits the covered walkway. The player waits at the crosswalk as vehicles pass through, including a black SUV, while a security officer stands nearby. The environment shifts from neon-dominated shelter to a more open, mixed-lighting intersection with tall modern buildings and active traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a neon-drenched urban corridor that gradually opens into a wide, bustling city intersection. It begins beneath an elevated highway, moving along a sheltered sidewalk past the Mark 24 and Delamain storefronts while the Watson Whore billboard glows in the distance. As the camera pushes deeper under the highway structure, the environment shifts into a corridor dominated by massive digital billboards for El Floppo and DTR, with the ambient light gradually increasing. The scene then expands as the camera exits the covered walkway and emerges into a wide intersection filled with tall modern buildings. Finally, the movement slows at a crosswalk where the lighting transitions from neon saturation to a mixed urban glow as a black SUV and a security officer pass by.
